bearerAuth.description: Value of WebUI.Token in the Authorization header. Query ?token= is also accepted by the server but is discouraged.

info.description: OpenAPI description of the qBitrr WebUI HTTP API. When WebUI.AuthDisabled is false, most routes require a Bearer token (WebUI.Token) or a valid browser session after login. Interactive docs: GET /web/docs or GET /api/docs. Human-readable reference: https://feramance.github.io/qBitrr/webui/api/
info.title: qBitrr WebUI API

parameters.description: Restrict to artists with at least one monitored album whose file is missing.
parameters.name: missing

parameters.description: Restrict to artists with at least one album whose Reason matches. Accepts Missing, Quality, CustomFormat, Upgrade, or 'Not being searched' (also matches NULL).
parameters.name: reason

level.description: CRITICAL, ERROR, WARNING, NOTICE, INFO, DEBUG, TRACE

get.summary: Version info (/api, requires Bearer or session)
Torrent counts by category and qBit instance
OIDC callback (default WebUI.OIDC.CallbackPath; set in config if different)

setupToken.description: QBITRR_SETUP_TOKEN or WebUI.Token. Required unless the caller already has a valid session or bearer token.

403.description: Setup token or authenticated session required
